headline: Assessing GoDaddy (GDDY) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: GoDaddy overview and recent stock performance GoDaddy (GDDY) has drawn investor attention after a period of weak share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month, past 3 months, and year, despite positive multi year total returns. At a last close of US$81.22, GoDaddy’s share price sits against a backdrop of annual revenue of US$4.95b and net income of US$875.0m. This offers investors a starting point to assess how sentiment compares with fundamentals. See our...
